data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of notifying clients about new provider details. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of such notifications being sent to clients, which is a critical part of the requirement. The linked use case explicitly states the need for client notifications, but there is no evidence of this functionality being executed in the saga run.
gaps: No evidence of client notifications being sent with new provider details.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify client notification functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if notifications are sent to clients when a new provider is assigned.
